prompt: Create a premium ecommerce hero image for a matte white skincare serum bottle on a minimal studio set. Use a centered product composition with soft rim lighting, a clean ivory and deep green palette, subtle glass reflections, and enough negative space on the right for short campaign copy. The image should feel luxurious, trustworthy, modern, and suitable for a high-conversion product landing page.
negative_prompt: avoid distorted packaging, unreadable text, copied logos, celebrity faces, protected characters, cluttered background, low-resolution artifacts
risk_notes: Template cases are used for visual structure only.
No third-party brand mark should be reproduced.
explanation: The plan borrows the reusable composition, lighting, and palette logic from relevant ad-creative cases while replacing all subject and brand-specific elements with the user's product.
